mapper.insert: insert into lego_agents (id, name, system_prompt, model_id, memory_policy_id, knowledge_base_policy, runtime_kind, max_react_iters) values (#{id}, #{name}, #{systemPrompt}, #{modelId}, #{memoryPolicyId}, cast(#{knowledgeBasePolicyJson} as jsonb), #{runtimeKind}, #{maxReactIters})
mapper.select: select a.id, a.name, a.system_prompt, a.model_id, coalesce(string_agg(t.tool_id, ',' order by t.tool_id), '') as tool_ids_csv, a.memory_policy_id, cast(a.knowledge_base_policy as text) as knowledge_base_policy_json, a.runtime_kind, a.max_react_iters, a.created_at from lego_agents a left join lego_agent_tools t on t.agent_id = a.id where a.id = #{id} group by a.id, a.name, a.system_prompt, a.model_id, a.memory_policy_id, a.knowledge_base_policy, a.runtime_kind, a.max_react_iters, a.created_at
select a.id from lego_agents a inner join lego_agent_tools t on t.agent_id = a.id where t.tool_id = #{toolId} order by a.created_at desc limit 20

select id from lego_agents where jsonb_typeof(knowledge_base_policy - > 'collectionIds') = 'array' and knowledge_base_policy - > 'collectionIds' @> jsonb_build_array(#{collectionId}) order by created_at desc
select id, name, cast(knowledge_base_policy as text) as knowledge_base_policy_json from lego_agents order by created_at desc
mapper.update: update lego_agents set name = #{name}, system_prompt = #{systemPrompt}, model_id = #{modelId}, memory_policy_id = #{memoryPolicyId}, knowledge_base_policy = cast(#{knowledgeBasePolicyJson} as jsonb), runtime_kind = #{runtimeKind}, max_react_iters = #{maxReactIters} where id = #{id}
mapper.select: select id, name from lego_agents where memory_policy_id = #{policyId} order by created_at desc
